nasb.text: But they went up heedlessly to the ridge of the hill country; neither the ark of the covenant of the Lord nor Moses left the camp.

esv.text: But they presumed to go up to the heights of the hill country, although neither the ark of the covenant of the Lord nor Moses departed out of the camp.

cnv.text: 他們卻擅自上山頂去，但是耶和華的約櫃和摩西並沒有離開營地。

ccb.text: 尽管耶和华的约柜和摩西都没有出营，他们却擅自上山顶去。
